title: Potted Delight
description: Adds compatability between Farmer's Delight and NotEnoughPots
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_818f3e66-8a54-43ca-b3da-19c1ca64b974.png) Adds compatability between [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) / [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated) and [NotEnoughPots](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-enough-pots "NotEnoughPots")

### **Place all your plants in flower pots.**
> _Ever wondered why you can't place some plants in flower pots?_ > _Well, now you can!_
- This Mod adds **14** Flower Pot variants of their Farmer's Delight plants - This Mod expands upon [NotEnoughPots](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/not-enough-pots "NotEnoughPots") and adds the variants for [Farmer's Delight](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/farmers-delight) / [Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)
* _**1.0**_ requires _Not Enough Pots_ **v1.3** or **v1.4** * _**1.1**_ (and newer) requires _Not Enough Pots_ **v1.5** (or newer)
![Overview of potted plants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/382d04436b6fdea04e9a96a02b093646d7ddb0c3.png)
